feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: QK
entry.content: >You're waiting at the bus stop when... >"Whatchu lookin' at, honkie?! Never seen a BLACK beautiful woman before?!!!" You have 10 seconds before she aggressively sucks your dick. How does the average man from your cunt get of this predicament?
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: AMERICAN HISTORY X
entry.content: i just watched the movie because it was highly rated but i don't quite understand the message or the moral of the story you could say the thing that happened at the end is the punishment of the protagonist or something but it literally has nothing to do with him, he didnt start it and the won't end the whole issue, and he was tortured enough i think in the end the story kinda give him the reason that black people = violent monkeys, it would be way easier to understand if it was just nazis = bad
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Watched the long walk As with 99% of Stephen King movies, the ending sucked and …
entry.content: Watched the long walk As with 99% of Stephen King movies, the ending sucked and the premise feels wasted. Felt like they tried super hard to force an R rating via inserting curse words every other line, which is odd given the closeup death scenes likely wouldve gotten them it. And the ending is just dumb. Soldiers vanish after the major is shot because....because they do? Alternate where the winner actually does what he says he will do during the walk makes more sense but im guessing it was axed
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: The SP was a downgrade and I'm tired of pretending that it wasn't. >B-but muh fr…
entry.content: The SP was a downgrade and I'm tired of pretending that it wasn't. >B-but muh front light Weakshit that didn't make up for the worse everything else. OG GBA was the future and SP was a step backwards to Gameboy Pocket mediocrity.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Reminder that they’re the same species, btw
entry.content: Pennywise uses his powers of reality and mind manipulation to produce fear in children to feed off of, whereas The Poppins does the same thing only with children’s joy. but the real kicker is when you find out they’re both the same species as The Cat in the Hat, who feeds off of chaos energy
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Human internet = Human verification
entry.content: To avoid deep fakes and bots, we all will have to be identified as humans at a genetic level with a chip. Thats the only way to have a human-only internet. There will be no other way to buy, sell or trade without guaranteed humanity when claimed. The future is bright.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /mu/ Music: He was great
entry.content: Why do people mock Crazy Frog? He had some great songs and was the big hit of the 2000s. People say he was annoying, but his takes on "Axel F", "Popcorn" and "We Are the Champions" surpass the originals. To this day people think Axel F was a Crazy Frog original.
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /g/ Technology: You can now emulate Windows for Itanium processors on two different emulators. O…
entry.content: You can now emulate Windows for Itanium processors on two different emulators. One's a Ski fork, the other's a QEMU fork, all thanks to vibe coders, and recent LLM and frontier AI autism. Itaniumchads... are we back? Thoughts on the Itanic renaissance?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: why does everyone hate OOP? I'm a codelet, only been studying Python for 2 month…
entry.content: why does everyone hate OOP? I'm a codelet, only been studying Python for 2 months now, and so far it's been very comfy. For a group project we even made a simple drone show with Python commands. But everyone always taks about OOP like it's the worst thing in the world. We're finally learning Classes and it's... not bad? I don't get the hate. you're just defining an "object", assigning traits and creating it's own unique internal functions.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Kia takes Michigan.
entry.content: Kia takes Michigan.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: /mu/ Draw thread
entry.content: Not a common thread around here, but why not try and have a drawthread dedicated to all things music? Draw album covers, singers/bands, characters interacting with music, devices that play music, instruments, generas, anything to do with the culture surrounding music. You can be a really good artist or just a Paint scribbler. Remember to enjoy yourself and have fun.
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /news/ News: Eat the Lettuce. The Lettuce is Fine.
entry.content: Trump's FDA pretends that they're still doing a serious investigation after Trump received his bribe from Taylor farms https://www.notus.org/health-scienc e/fda-taylor-farms-false-positive Confusion swirled around the ongoing cyclosporiasis outbreak on Monday after the produce supplier linked to the illness pushed back against the Food and Drug Administration. FDA officials said in a press call on Monday that its investigation still points to Taylor Farms’ iceberg lettuce as the source of the ou
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: RE4 remake is better than the original because the opening is much less arcady a…
entry.content: RE4 remake is better than the original because the opening is much less arcady and more atmospheric and moody. The true mark of an excellent horror game is its ability to be subtle. The original just immediately confronts you with the enemy you are going to fight within the first few minutes of gameplay and then just forces you to keep going before you've even found your footing. The remake is much more modern and nuanced in its design taking into account players from all walks of life. It also
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Why is the C5 Corvette so based
entry.content: Is there a better performance bargain than the C5 (Z06) Corvette, /o/? I've had mine for a year now and it still makes me smile every time I turn the key and take it for a spin. The LS6 has tons of torque and the fact that a C5Z weighs like nothing means it also handles really well. Outside of a Miata I can't really think of anything that can compete with it, and a Miata serves an entirely different purpose. Fun thrills at lower speeds. Give me some alternatives. I'm not going to sell my Z any t
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Is there a reason the events of Resident Evil take place during July/August and …
entry.content: Is there a reason the events of Resident Evil take place during July/August and into September? One would assume for a zombie horror game they'd have made it take place during Halloween but this was actually in the summer months. I always found that interesting about RE1/RE2/RE3

entry.title: /g/ Technology: here's my experience with FOSS (FreeCAD) >encounter a software-breaking bug that…
entry.content: here's my experience with FOSS (FreeCAD) >encounter a software-breaking bug that I had to report to github page in the first day of use by just using it according to manual >the whole toolbox in one of the workspaces disappeared and doesn't want to show up again, and nobody on subreddit, discord or official forum know how to get it back >had to fix it myself but now every time I start FreeCAD I have to manually turn on visibility for EVERY toolbar >can't make chamfers or fillets to the edge of t
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /mu/ Music: How do I cope knowing that the years (formative highschool and college years) I …
entry.content: How do I cope knowing that the years (formative highschool and college years) I was still discovering my most favorite band and their music was the same year they made their final live show (merch also non-existent)? I feel like a poser, and that I missed out a pivotal key moment of my life. They're an indie from Chicago that came with the 2010s alt-rock boom. Not going to name the band cause you guys will call it cringe normie slop, but goddamnit they meant everything for me.
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music
